working_on.task: Added functionality to add new accounts and edit existing ones via Modals
working_on.notes: Admin account CRUD operations are fully functional.

pending_tasks.task: Testing the Admin Add/Edit features directly in the running app
pending_tasks.notes: Waiting for user to deploy/run and verify.

recent_changes.description: Implemented Add and Edit account modals for Admin.
Resolved git merge conflict between fix/admin-crud and main branch in admin-account-list.html.

errors_encountered.solution: Manually combined HEAD and origin/main to keep both Modals and Toast notifications.

errors_encountered.error: Accidental ppt files tracked by Git
errors_encountered.solution: Ran git rm -r tmp_slide/ to clean up the repository.

decisions_made.decision: Use Modals for Add/Edit Account in Admin page
decisions_made.reason: Keeps the user on the same page and provides a faster, smoother experience compared to redirecting to a new page. Consistent with the Category management page.
